title: Trump replaces Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary after ad campaign
shortDescription: Trump said March 5 he is replacing DHS Secretary Kristi Noem after scrutiny over a $220M ad campaign, naming Sen. Markwayne Mullin as successor.

title: Trump fires Kristi Noem as DHS secretary
shortDescription: Trump fired Kristi Noem as secretary of the Department of Homeland Security after lawmakers grilled her over an ad campaign that featured her.

title: New survey crowns Ford No. 1 — and Bill Ford has a message for America
shortDescription: A new survey found that Ford is viewed as the most American brand across party lines and income levels. So here's what Bill Ford wants.

title: Teacher unions have organized protest against GOP policies
shortDescription: Teacher unions have protested GOP policies. Here Members of the Chicago Teachers Union protest ICE immigration enforcement at a Target

title: Former Marine dragged out of congressional hearing
shortDescription: A former Marine, Brian McGinnis, was lifted off his feet and carried out of a congressional hearing on the Iran war.

title: Democrats grill Kristi Noem in DHS oversight hearing | The Excerpt
shortDescription: A tense House hearing with Secretary Kristi Noem sparked debate as Democrats pressed her on DHS tactics and the two fatal shootings of two Americans.

title: Boots on the ground? Trump backs possible Kurdish attack in Iran: live
shortDescription: At least six US soldiers have been killed so far as war spreads throughout the region. Trump has given the US war effort a rating of '15' out of 10.

title: Trump's war with Iran is polling badly, fraying MAGA
shortDescription: Trump's war in Iran is polling badly. Will public opinion shift, or will it continue to fray his MAGA coalition?

title: Iran wants 'blood', Trump says US can fight 'forever'. What to expect.
shortDescription: Iran doesn’t want to talk. It doesn’t want to parley. And it’s not sitting down with President Donald Trump. Here's what may be next in the Iran war.

title: White House ballroom vote delayed amid deluge of angry public comments
shortDescription: Over 100 people have registered to speak and more than 35,000 written comments have been sent in, the vast majority of which are negative.

title: Republican Sen. Steve Daines drops reelection bid
shortDescription: Sen. Steve Daines, 63, said that he was "thankful" to serve alongside President Donald Trump.

title: Senate fails to block US involvement in Iran war
shortDescription: The Senate failed to advance a war powers resolution to halt military hostilities against Iran and end American involvement in the escalating war.

title: Watch viral Smoothie King interaction over Trump hoodie
shortDescription: The employee told Fox News that she refused service "due to discomfort with a customer interaction," adding that she is facing online harassment.

title: Is support for Trump waning due to immigration policy?
shortDescription: A growing backlash to ICE tactics is fueling a major shift in public opinion on Trump’s immigration strategy.
